name: US Foods Holding Corp.
summary: US Foods Holding Corp. is a national foodservice distributor supplying approximately 250,000 customer locations including independent restaurants, chain restaurants, healthcare, hospitality, government, and education customers. The company provides fresh, frozen, and dry food products as well as non-food items sourced from thousands of suppliers. It operates over 70 distribution facilities, a fleet of over 6,500 trucks, and over 90 cash and carry locations, supported by its MOX ecommerce platform and Exclusive Brand portfolio.
